description:
Offered: every semester
A mixed chorus (soprano, alto, tenor, bass), this choir prepares choral works from various periods and styles. Concert Choir is open to all students, and partially satisfies the ensemble requirement for music minors. Extra performances required.
Note: May be repeated for credit 10 times. 3 such credits can be counted toward one Gen Ed designation.
Meets General Education Requirement(s): AIA, DP, FA, IHIP
